title: narcissus aureus var. cupularis
intro: Narcissus aureus var. cupularis, also known as the cup-shaped daffodil or wild daffodil, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family and is native to Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Narcissus aureus var. cupularis include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
